candidate.name: Promote safe planar command-conditioned locomotion
candidate.hypothesis: World-to-body command transformation, direction-specific gait authority, delay-aware lateral lean, and world-frame cross-track feedback can cover stop, forward, reverse, lateral, yaw, delay, and disturbed lateral commands without changing the robot ABI.
candidate.expectedEffect: Pass every locked command-tracking safety and tracking gate, improve the frozen command baseline, and preserve the solved spatial-generalization behavior on its original Controller.

from.name: Spatial quadruped with motion command, force, IMU, and actuator history

to.name: Spatial quadruped with motion command, force, IMU, and actuator history
